destinations.name: Thailand

destinations.name: France
destinations.description: Paris skyline, historical châteaux, and world-renowned art and fashion

destinations.name: Egypt
destinations.description: Giza Pyramids, Nile cruises, and mysterious ancient ruins

destinations.name: Maldives
destinations.description: Overwater villas, turquoise lagoons, and private island calm

destinations.name: Dubai
destinations.description: Futuristic skyline, golden deserts, and world-class dining

destinations.name: Singapore
destinations.description: Garden city wonders, hawker centers, and stunning architecture

destinations.name: Bali
destinations.description: Sacred temples, rice terraces, and serene spa retreats

destinations.name: Vietnam
destinations.description: Limestone bays, old quarters, and unforgettable local cuisine

destinations.name: Japan
destinations.description: Neon cities, mountain shrines, and iconic seasonal beauty

destinations.name: Europe
destinations.description: Multi-city classics with guided tours and premium stays

destinations.name: Spiti Valley
destinations.description: The middle land between Tibet and India, a cold desert mountain valley

destinations.name: Himachal Pradesh
destinations.description: Mist-covered mountains, lush valleys, and serene pine forests
destinations.bestTimeToVisit: March to June, September to December

destinations.name: Ladakh
destinations.description: Turquoise lakes, ancient monasteries, and high-altitude mountain passes

destinations.name: Kashmir
destinations.description: Shikara rides on Dal Lake, blooming tulip gardens, and snow-capped peaks

destinations.name: Kerala
destinations.description: Tranquil backwaters, palm-fringed canals, and Ayurvedic spa retreats

destinations.name: Goa
destinations.description: Golden sand beaches, historic churches, and vibrant coastal cuisine

destinations.name: Rajasthan
destinations.description: Majestic forts, desert safaris, and luxurious royal palace stays

destinations.name: Canada
destinations.description: Lakes, soaring mountain peaks, and deep forest trails in the Rockies

destinations.name: Italy
destinations.description: Venice gondolas, ancient Roman ruins, and Tuscan culinary heritage
destinations.bestTimeToVisit: April to June, September to October

destinations.name: Almaty
destinations.description: Snowy peak backdrops, turquoise alpine lakes, and modern hospitality in Kazakhstan

destinations.name: Phuket & Krabi Twin Paradise
destinations.description: Indulge in a beautiful 4-day getaway exploring the best of Phuket and Krabi with private transfers, comfortable stays, and sightseeing tours.

destinations.name: Hanoi Danang package
destinations.description: Embark on a captivating journey across Vietnam. Discover the historical streets of Hanoi, cruise through the dramatic limestone peaks of Halong Bay, and explore the European style of Ba Na Hills and the Golden Bridge.

destinations.name: Bali Romantic Getaway
destinations.description: Spend a romantic vacation across Bali, splitting your stay between the lively beaches of Kuta and the artistic, lush green valley of Ubud. Includes a private photoshoot and winery tour.

destinations.name: Andaman Delight
destinations.description: Escape to the beautiful Andaman archipelago. Visit historical Cellular Jail in Port Blair, relax on the white sands of Radhanagar Beach in Havelock, and see the natural coral reefs of Neil Island.

destinations.name: Meghalaya: Jungle to Clouds
destinations.description: Journey through the stunning landscapes of Northeast India. Spot rhinos in Kaziranga, trek to the Double Decker Root Bridge in Nongriat, and boat on the crystal-clear Umngot River in Dawki.

destinations.name: Rishikesh
destinations.description: Experience white water rafting and camping in the adventure capital of India.

destinations.name: Jim Corbett
destinations.description: Explore the wilderness of India's oldest national park and spot the majestic Bengal tiger.

destinations.name: Sikkim & Darjeeling
destinations.description: A scenic escape into the Eastern Himalayas, covering Tsomgo Lake, tea gardens, and Tiger Hill.

destinations.name: Tawang
destinations.description: Explore Tawang Monastery, Sangetsar Lake, and cross the majestic high-altitude Sela Pass.

destinations.name: Kenya
destinations.description: Witness the great wildebeest migration, explore Maasai Mara, and experience authentic African safaris.

packages.name: Twin Paradise: Phuket & Krabi
highlights: Phuket City Tour (Wat Chalong, Monkey View Point, Old Town)

itinerary.title: Arrival at Phuket & Transfer to Krabi
details: Arrive at Phuket Airport.
Private transfer to your hotel in Krabi.
Check-in at Apple A Day Resort (Deluxe Room).
Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Krabi
details: Savor breakfast at the resort.
Explore the beautiful beaches of Krabi on your own.
Enjoy optional activities like island hopping or local shopping.

itinerary.title: Krabi to Phuket Transfer
details: Breakfast at the hotel followed by check-out.
Private transfer from your Krabi hotel to your hotel in Phuket.
Check-in at Patong Bay Residence or similar (Deluxe Room).
Spend the evening exploring Patong Beach or local markets.

itinerary.title: Phuket City Tour & Departure
details: Savor breakfast and check out from your hotel.
Enjoy a guided Phuket City Tour visiting Wat Chalong, Monkey View Point, a Cashew Nut Factory, and Old Phuket Town.
Private transfer to Phuket Airport for your departure flight back home.

packages.name: Hanoi Danang package
highlights: Halong Bay Day Cruise (Harmony Cruise / Deluxe Cruise)
Ba Na Hills & Golden Bridge Tour with Cable Car
Hanoi City Tour (Temple of Literature & Hoa Lo Prison)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi & Afternoon City Tour
details: Meet and greet at Noi Bai International Airport.
Private transfer to Oriental Suites Hotel & Spa (Hoan Kiem District).
Enjoy a half-day afternoon Hanoi City Tour on SIC basis visiting the Temple of Literature and Hoa Lo Prison (Hanoi Hilton).

itinerary.title: Full Day Halong Bay Day Cruise
details: Pick up from your hotel for a day trip to Halong Bay via 35-seater bus.
Board Harmony Cruise / similar deluxe cruise.
Enjoy a local lunch onboard while cruising through limestone islands.
Explore the Surprising Cave, visit Titop Island for panoramic views, and enjoy kayaking or swimming.

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Danang Transfer
details: Breakfast at the hotel, followed by checkout.
Private transfer to Noi Bai Airport for your flight to Danang.
Private transfer from Danang Airport to Yarra Ocean Suite Hotel.
Check-in and enjoy the evening at leisure near the ocean.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Ba Na Hills & Golden Bridge
details: Depart for a full-day trip to Ba Na Hills and the Golden Bridge on SIC basis.
Ride the modern cable car system to the mountain peak.
Walk across the awe-inspiring Golden Bridge, looking like a silk strip in the clouds.
Explore the French Village, Luna Castle, and enjoy games at Fantasy Park.

itinerary.title: Danang Departure
details: Breakfast at the hotel and checkout.
Private transfer and drop-off at Da Nang International Airport for your return flight.

packages.name: Bali Romantic Getaway
highlights: Eden Hotel or similar stay (Kuta - 3 Nights)
Ubud Heaven Sayan or similar stay (Ubud - 2 Nights)
Private Photoshoot at Sari Timbul (Scenic Garden Art Gallery)
Queens Tandoor Candle Light Dinner (Petal Flowers Table Decor)
Sababay Winery Tour and Taste (Non-Alcohol package)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali & Kuta Check-in
details: Meet and greet at Denpasar International Airport.
Private transfer to Eden Hotel or similar in Kuta.
Enjoy the rest of the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Kuta
details: Enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
Spend the day relaxing at Kuta Beach, shopping, or exploring nearby cafes.

itinerary.title: Kuta Exploration & Relax
details: Savor breakfast at the hotel.
Enjoy another free day to unwind, go surfing, or book optional water sports.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Ubud & Sari Timbul Photoshoot
details: Check-out from Kuta hotel.
Private inter-hotel transfer to Ubud Heaven Sayan.
Enjoy a private photoshoot at the viral hidden gem, Sari Timbul (Sari Timbu) with serene bamboo structures and art gardens.

itinerary.title: Winery Tour & Romantic Candlelight Dinner
details: Explore the unique Sababay Winery with a guided tour and non-alcoholic tastings.
In the evening, experience a romantic candlelight dinner at Queens Tandoor featuring beautiful petal flower arrangements on your table.

itinerary.title: Departure from Bali
details: Enjoy breakfast and complete the check-out.
Private transfer to Denpasar International Airport for your departure flight.

packages.name: Andaman Delight
highlights: The Pearl Hotel stays (Port Blair - 2 Nights)
Deep Sea Beach Resort stay (Neil Island - 1 Night)
Cellular Jail Light and Sound Show ticket

itinerary.title: Arrival in Port Blair & Cellular Jail
details: Arrive at Port Blair Airport and meet our representative.
Transfer to The Pearl Hotel.
In the afternoon, visit Carbyn Cove Beach and Cellular Jail.
At 6:00 PM, watch the emotional Light & Sound Show highlighting India's freedom struggle.

itinerary.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island & Radhanagar Beach
details: Early morning departure (with packed breakfast) to Port Blair Harbour.
Board the cruise to Havelock Island.
Transfer to All Seasons Resort upon arrival.
In the afternoon, proceed to the world-famous Radhanagar Beach, rated as the finest beach in Asia by Time Magazine.

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach Snorkeling & Kalapathar Beach
details: Proceed to Elephant Beach, known for shallow crystal-clear waters and colorful coral reefs.
Enjoy snorkeling and walking on the pristine white sand.
In the evening, visit Kalapathar Beach with its unique black rocks and turquoise waters, perfect for photography.

itinerary.title: Havelock Island to Neil Island
details: Breakfast at the hotel, followed by transfer to jetty.
Board inter-island ferry to Neil Island.
Transfer to Deep Sea Beach Resort.
Visit Sitapur Beach, Bharatpur Beach, Lakshmanpur Beach, and the Natural Rock Bridge Formation.

itinerary.title: Neil Island to Port Blair & Chidiyatapu Sunset
details: Breakfast and checkout from Neil Island hotel.
Return to Port Blair by ferry and transfer back to The Pearl.
After lunch, visit Chidiyatapu (Bird Island) to see mangrove forests and catch the glorious sunset at Sunset Point.
Enjoy shopping and leisure in Port Blair.

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast at the hotel.
Checkout and private transfer to Veer Savarkar Airport for your departure flight.

packages.name: Meghalaya: Jungle to Clouds
highlights: Kaziranga National Park Jeep Safari & Rhino Spotting
Cherrapunji Waterfalls & Double Decker Living Root Bridge Trek
Umngot River Boating in Dawki (Asia's Cleanest River)
Krang Suri magical blue waterfall & pool dip

itinerary.title: Guwahati Airport to Kaziranga National Park
details: Greeted by representative at Guwahati Airport / Station.
Private transfer to Kaziranga National Park and check into hotel.
Relax for the day.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga Jeep Safari & Transfer to Shillong
details: Early morning Jeep Safari in Kaziranga National Park to spot One-Horned Rhinos and other exotic wildlife.
Return to hotel for breakfast, then drive to Shillong.
Stop at Umiam Lake (Borapani) for photos and views.
Check-in at hotel in Shillong and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji via Laitlum Canyon
details: Post-breakfast transfer to Cherrapunji.
Visit Laitlum Canyon, Mawkdok Dympep View Point, Wei Sawdong Falls, Nohkalikai Falls, and Garden of Caves.
Enjoy stunning views of Seven Sisters Waterfalls.
Overnight stay in Cherrapunji.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunji Nongriat Trek (Double Decker Root Bridge)
details: After breakfast, gear up for the trek to the double-decker living root bridge in Nongriat with a local guide.
Explore the surroundings; optional hike to Rainbow Falls.
Return and spend the night in Cherrapunji.

itinerary.title: Mawlynnong Village & Dawki Boating
details: Drive to Mawlynnong (Asia's Cleanest Village).
See the Balancing Rock and Riwai Single Decker Living Root Bridge.
Drive to Dawki for boating in the crystal-clear waters of the Umngot River.
Overnight stay in Shnongpdeng/Dawki.

itinerary.title: Dawki to Shillong via Krang Suri Waterfalls
details: Wake up and enjoy breakfast.
Drive via Jowai to visit Krang Suri Waterfalls.
Take a refreshing dip in the natural blue pool.
Return to Shillong with a photo stop at Laitlum Canyons.
Overnight stay in Shillong.

itinerary.title: Shillong to Guwahati Airport Drop
details: Breakfast at the hotel.
Private transfer and drop-off at Guwahati Airport / Railway Station for departure.

packages.name: Hampta Pass Trek With Chandratal: 5-Day Thrilling Adventure

itinerary.title: Manali to Jobra & Trek to Chika
details: Drive from Manali to Jobra (approx. 2 hours)
Gentle trek to Chika through pine and maple forests
Camp near Rani Nallah stream

itinerary.title: Trek from Chika to Balu Ka Ghera
details: Trek through Jwara meadows crossing mountain streams
Enjoy beautiful vistas of snow-capped peaks
Camp at Balu Ka Ghera

itinerary.title: Balu Ka Ghera over Hampta Pass to Shea Goru
details: Cross the challenging Hampta Pass (14,100 ft)
Panoramic views of the Pir Panjal range
Descend into the stark barren valley of Shea Goru

itinerary.title: Trek to Chatru & Drive to Chandratal Lake
details: Trek down to Chatru and board vehicles
Drive to the spectacular crescent-shaped Chandratal Lake
Return to campsite at Chatru

itinerary.title: Drive from Chatru to Manali
details: Drive back to Manali via Lahaul Valley and Atal Tunnel
End of the thrilling trekking adventure

itinerary.title: Arrival in Port Blair
details: Private transfer from Veer Savarkar Airport to hotel
Check in and relax
Optional visit to local beaches or markets

itinerary.title: Port Blair to Havelock & Radhanagar Beach
details: Transfer to jetty and board private ferry cruise to Havelock
Check in at beachfront resort
Spend the afternoon at world-famous Radhanagar Beach

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach Excursion
details: Boat ride to Elephant Beach for water activities
Enjoy snorkeling, swimming, or optional Scuba Diving
Ferry back to Port Blair in the evening

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Savor breakfast at the hotel
Check out and private transfer to Port Blair Airport for flight

packages.name: River Rafting in Rishikesh | 2 Days Adventure Packages by Go4Explore

itinerary.title: Arrival in Rishikesh & Waterfall Hike
details: Check into riverside camps near Neergarh waterfall
Enjoy a hot lunch at the campsite
Hike to the Neer Garh Waterfall
Evening bonfire with music, snacks, and dinner

itinerary.title: 16km White Water Rafting & Local Exploration
details: Breakfast at camps followed by checkout
Transfer to the rafting point
Enjoy a thrilling 16km rafting session through major rapids
Experience cliff jumping and body surfing
Explore Lakshman Jhula and local cafes before departure

packages.name: Jim Corbett Tour Package for 2 Nights / 3 Days with 1 Gypsy Safari
highlights: 2 Nights stay in Corbett Wildlife Resort
1 Gypsy Safari in Tiger Reserve Zone
Garjiya Devi Temple & Corbett Museum visit

itinerary.title: Arrival at Jim Corbett Resort
details: Check-in at pre-booked wildlife resort in Ramnagar
Enjoy a welcome drink and buffet lunch
Evening at leisure or visit Kosi River and Garjiya Devi Temple
Dinner and overnight stay

itinerary.title: Morning Gypsy Safari & Resort Activities
details: Early morning departure for a 4x4 Gypsy Safari in Corbett Tiger Reserve
Search for Bengal tigers, elephants, deer, and exotic birds
Return to resort for breakfast and relax by the pool
Evening bonfire, dinner, and overnight stay

itinerary.title: Resort Check-out & Departure
details: Savor breakfast at the resort
Complete check-out and visit Corbett Museum
Depart for your return journey

packages.name: Maldives Blissful Family Getaway
highlights: Beach Villa & Water Villa Stay Combo

itinerary.title: Arrival in Maldives
details: Arrive at Malé Airport
Board the shared speedboat transfer to your resort
Check in to your Beach Villa and settle in

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Water Activities
details: Enjoy the white sand beaches and lagoon
Join the included guided snorkeling trip to explore coral reefs
Spend the night in your Beach Villa

itinerary.title: Water Villa Experience & Dolphin Watching
details: Move and check in to your Water Villa with direct lagoon access
Board the afternoon dolphin-watching boat cruise
Enjoy a romantic dinner over the water

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast at the resort and check out
Speedboat transfer back to Malé Airport for departure flight

packages.name: Kashmir Travel Package from Srinagar | 5 Nights 6 Days | Go4Explore
highlights: Premium Stays & Houseboat on Dal Lake
Gondola Ride in Gulmarg (Asia's Highest Cable Car)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar & Mughal Gardens
details: Pickup from Srinagar Airport and transfer to hotel
Visit Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi
Dinner and overnight stay in Srinagar

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Gulmarg & Gondola Ride
details: Drive to Gulmarg, the Meadow of Flowers
Ride the famous Gulmarg Gondola (cable car) to the peaks
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Sonamarg Glacier
details: Excursion to Sonamarg, the Meadow of Gold
Enjoy views of snowy mountains and optional pony rides to Thajiwas Glacier
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam Valley
details: Drive to Pahalgam passing saffron fields and Awantipura ruins
Check in to Pahalgam hotel
Explore Lidder River valley and local trails
Overnight stay in Pahalgam

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar & Houseboat Stay
details: Return drive to Srinagar and check in to premium Dal Lake Houseboat
Enjoy a scenic 1-hour Shikara ride on the lake
Overnight stay in the Houseboat

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast on the houseboat, checkout, and transfer to airport

packages.name: Andaman serenity
highlights: 5 Nights Port Blair, Havelock & Neil Island
Natural Rock Bridge Formation on Neil Island

itinerary.title: Arrival & Port Blair Sightseeing
details: Pickup at Port Blair Airport and private transfer to hotel
Visit Corbyn's Cove Beach
Watch the Cellular Jail Light & Sound Show in the evening

itinerary.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
details: Transfer to harbor and board cruise ferry to Havelock
Settle in at resort
Enjoy sunset at Radhanagar Beach

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach Excursion
details: Boat trip to Elephant Beach for coral reef views
Included snorkeling session in shallow crystal waters
Overnight in Havelock

itinerary.title: Havelock to Neil Island Tour
details: Take ferry to Neil Island
Check in at resort
Visit Sitapur, Laxmanpur beaches, and the Natural Rock Bridge

itinerary.title: Neil Island to Port Blair
details: Morning checkout and ferry back to Port Blair
Leisure afternoon and shopping in Port Blair markets
Overnight stay in Port Blair

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast at hotel, check out, and transfer to airport

packages.name: Himachal – Himalayan Highs
highlights: Atal Tunnel & Sissu Lahaul Valley drive
Hadimba Temple & Mall Road City Tour

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manali & City Tour
details: Pickup from Manali Volvo stand and transfer to hotel
Visit Hadimba Devi Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, and Van Vihar
Free evening to explore Mall Road
Overnight in Manali

itinerary.title: Solang Valley, Atal Tunnel & Sissu
details: Drive to Solang Valley for paragliding and zip-lining
Cross the Atal Tunnel to explore Sissu in Lahaul Valley
Return to Manali for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Manikaran Hot Springs & Kasol
details: Full day trip to Kasol in Parvati Valley
Visit Manikaran hot springs and gurudwara
Return to Manali for dinner and overnight stay

itinerary.title: Checkout & Departure
details: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to Manali Volvo stand for return journey

packages.name: Spiti Valley Circuit Tour Packages | Spiti Valley Circuit Trip from Delhi & Shimla to Manali
highlights: Shimla to Manali Complete Spiti Loop

itinerary.title: Shimla to Chitkul
details: Drive from Shimla to Chitkul, the last village on the Indo-Tibetan border
Overnight stay in Chitkul

itinerary.title: Chitkul to Kalpa
details: Short drive to Kalpa overlooking Kinnaur Kailash range
Explore Roghi Suicide Point
Overnight stay in Kalpa

itinerary.title: Kalpa to Tabo via Gue Mummy
details: Drive to Tabo via Nako Lake and Khab Sangam
Visit Gue village to see the 500-year-old mummified monk
Overnight stay in Tabo

itinerary.title: Tabo to Kaza via Dhankar Monastery
details: Explore ancient Tabo and Dhankar Monasteries
Drive to Kaza and check in
Overnight stay in Kaza

itinerary.title: Kaza Local (Langza, Komic & Hikkim)
details: Visit fossil village Langza, high altitude Komic monastery
Send a postcard from the highest post office in Hikkim
Overnight stay in Kaza

itinerary.title: Kaza to Chandratal via Key & Chicham
details: Visit spectacular Key Monastery and cross Chicham Bridge
Drive to Chandratal Lake
Overnight stay in Swiss camps at Chandratal

itinerary.title: Chandratal to Manali via Atal Tunnel
details: Scenic drive from Chandratal to Manali crossing the Atal Tunnel
End of the epic circuit

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar & City Tour
details: Srinagar Airport pickup and hotel check-in
Visit Shankaracharya Temple, Nishat Bagh, and Shalimar Bagh
1-hour Shikara ride on Dal Lake
Overnight in Srinagar

itinerary.title: Day Excursion to Pahalgam
details: Full day trip to Pahalgam, the Valley of Shepherds
See saffron fields and Apple orchards along Lidder River
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Day Excursion to Gulmarg
details: Travel to Gulmarg, Meadow of Flowers
Enjoy optional Gondola cable car ride and snow walks
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Day Excursion to Sonamarg
details: Day trip to Sonamarg, the Meadow of Gold
Explore glaciers and mountain streams
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast at the hotel, checkout, and transfer to airport

itinerary.title: Cochin to Munnar Hills
details: Pickup from Cochin Airport/Station
Drive to Munnar stopping at Cheeyappara Waterfalls
Check in and relax at resort

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
details: Explore Eravikulam National Park (Nilgiri Tahr)
Visit Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, and Tata Tea Museum
Evening shopping for spices and tea

itinerary.title: Munnar to Thekkady (Periyar)
details: Drive to Thekkady spice capital
Explore spice plantations and Periyar Lake
Optional Kathakali or Kalaripayattu shows
Overnight in Thekkady

itinerary.title: Thekkady to Alleppey Houseboat
details: Drive to Alleppey and check into a private traditional houseboat
Enjoy a scenic cruise through backwaters with local meals
Overnight stay onboard

itinerary.title: Alleppey to Cochin Departure
details: Disembark houseboat, transfer back to Kochi
Visit Fort Kochi, Jewish Synagogue, and Chinese Fishing Nets
Drop-off at airport/station

packages.name: Meghalaya Waterfalls & Root Trails | Himavat Destinations
highlights: Double-Decker Living Root Bridge Nongriat Trek

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Shillong
details: Pickup from Guwahati Airport/Station
Drive to Shillong stopping at Umiam Lake en route
Check in and explore Police Bazaar
Overnight in Shillong

itinerary.title: Shillong Sightseeing
details: Visit Elephant Falls, Wards Lake, and Shillong Peak viewpoint
Dinner and overnight stay in Shillong

itinerary.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji Waterfalls
details: Drive to Cherrapunji
Visit Nohkalikai Falls, Seven Sisters Falls, Mawsmai Cave, and Mawkdok viewpoint
Overnight stay in Cherrapunji

itinerary.title: Double-Decker Living Root Bridge Trek
details: Trek from Tyrna village down 3,500 steps to Double-Decker Living Root Bridge in Nongriat
Optional hike to Rainbow Falls
Overnight stay in Cherrapunji

itinerary.title: Dawki Boating & Mawlynnong Cleanest Village
details: Visit Mawlynnong (Asia's Cleanest Village) and Riwai Single Root Bridge
Drive to Dawki for boating in clear Umngot River
Return to Shillong for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Shillong to Guwahati Drop
details: Drive back to Guwahati and transfer to airport/station for departure

packages.name: Leh Ladakh Tour with Umling La & Hanle | Ladakh Backpacking Adventure | Go4Explore
highlights: Shyok River drive to Pangong Tso
Umling La (19,024 ft) - World's Highest Road

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh & Acclimatization
details: Pickup from airport, check-in, and full day rest for altitude adjustment
Overnight in Leh

itinerary.title: Leh Palace & Shanti Stupa Sightseeing
details: Visit Shanti Stupa, Leh Palace, and local markets
Check vehicles and prep for high altitude drive
Overnight in Leh

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
details: Cross Khardung La (17,580 ft)
Drive to Nubra Valley, check in
Ride double-humped camels at Hunder sand dunes
Overnight in Nubra

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso via Shyok
details: Scenic drive along Shyok River to Pangong Tso
Enjoy spectacular lake views at 14,000 ft
Overnight stay in lakeside camps

itinerary.title: Pangong Tso to Hanle via Rezang La
details: Drive through remote Changthang region passing Chushul and Rezang La War Memorial
Arrive at Hanle, visit Astronomical Observatory for stargazing
Overnight stay in Hanle homestay

itinerary.title: Hanle to Umling La (19,024 ft) Excursion
details: Ascend to Umling La (19,024 ft) - the highest motorable road in the world
Take photos at the summit and return to Hanle for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Hanle back to Leh
details: Drive from Hanle back to Leh via Chumathang hot springs
Overnight stay in Leh

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Check out and drop to Leh airport for departure flight

packages.name: Sikkim & Darjeeling Himalayan Escape | Himavat Destinations

itinerary.title: Arrival & Transfer to Gangtok
details: Pickup from NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport
Private drive to Gangtok, check in to hotel
Evening walk around MG Marg
Overnight stay in Gangtok

itinerary.title: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir Excursion
details: Excursion to high-altitude Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir
Optional permit/visit to Nathula Pass
Return to Gangtok for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Gangtok to Darjeeling
details: Check out and drive through scenic tea garden estates to Darjeeling
Check in and enjoy the evening at leisure or local markets
Overnight stay in Darjeeling

itinerary.title: Tiger Hill Sunrise & Darjeeling Sightseeing
details: Early morning sunrise view over Mt. Kanchenjunga from Tiger Hill
Visit Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop, Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, and tea gardens
Overnight stay in Darjeeling

itinerary.title: Darjeeling to NJP/Bagdogra Departure
details: Breakfast at hotel, check out, and transfer back to NJP or Bagdogra for departure flight

packages.name: Tawang Valleys & Himalayan Passes | Himavat Destinations
highlights: Crossing Sela Pass (13,700 ft) & Sela Lake
Bum La Pass Indo-China Border Excursion

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Dirang / Bomdila
details: Pickup in Guwahati and drive towards mountain foothills
Arrive in Dirang/Bomdila for check-in and acclimatization
Overnight stay

itinerary.title: Dirang to Tawang via Sela Pass
details: Ascend and cross the majestic Sela Pass (13,700 ft) and Sela Lake
Stop at Jaswant Garh War Memorial
Check in at hotel in Tawang
Overnight stay

itinerary.title: Tawang Monastery & Local Sightseeing
details: Visit the historic Tawang Monastery and War Memorial
Explore local craft markets and cultural spots
Overnight stay in Tawang

itinerary.title: Bum La Pass & Sangetsar Lake Excursion
details: Drive to Bum La Pass on the Indo-China border (subject to permit)
Visit the picturesque Sangetsar Lake (Madhuri Lake)
Return to Tawang for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Tawang to Bomdila via Nuranang Falls
details: Checkout and drive down towards Bomdila
Stop at Nuranang (Jang) Waterfalls
Check in at hotel in Bomdila for overnight stay

itinerary.title: Bomdila back to Guwahati
details: Drive back from Bomdila down to plains of Guwahati
Check-in and evening at leisure in Guwahati
Overnight stay

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Breakfast at hotel, checkout, and drop to Guwahati Airport/Station for departure

packages.name: Rajasthan Explorer Tour Package – Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur & Jaisalmer

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
details: Pickup and transfer to hotel
Visit Hawa Mahal and Amber Fort
Overnight stay in Jaipur

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
details: Drive to Blue City Jodhpur
Explore Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada
Overnight stay in Jodhpur

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer Desert
details: Drive to Golden City Jaisalmer
Check in to luxury Swiss desert camps
Enjoy camel safari, sand dune sunset, and folk dances
Overnight in Jaisalmer Camp

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Fort to Udaipur
details: Visit Jaisalmer Fort and Havelis
Drive towards Udaipur, the City of Lakes
Check in and overnight in Udaipur

itinerary.title: Udaipur Sightseeing & Lakes
details: Visit City Palace and Jagdish Temple
Enjoy a scenic boat cruise on Lake Pichola
Overnight stay in Udaipur

itinerary.title: Departure
details: Savor breakfast and check out from hotel
Private drop at Udaipur airport/station for departure flight

itinerary.title: Arrival in Nairobi & Transfer to Lake Nakuru
details: Meet and assist at Jomo Kenyatta Airport in Nairobi
Drive to Lake Nakuru National Park
Afternoon game drive to spot flamingos and rhinos
Dinner and stay at safari lodge

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
details: Breakfast and drive to the world-famous Maasai Mara Game Reserve
Arrive in time for lunch and settle in at luxury tented camp
Late afternoon game drive
Overnight stay at Mara Camp

itinerary.title: Full Day Maasai Mara Game Drives
details: Morning and afternoon game drives in search of the Big Five (lion, leopard, elephant, buffalo, rhino)
Enjoy picnic lunch in the reserve near Mara River
Overnight stay at Mara Camp

itinerary.title: Maasai Village Visit & Game Drive
details: Optional hot air balloon safari or morning game drive
Visit a traditional Maasai village to learn about their culture
Afternoon game drive and overnight stay

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara back to Nairobi
details: Early morning game drive and breakfast at camp
Checkout and drive back to Nairobi
Drop-off at Jomo Kenyatta Airport for departure flight
